    select
        u1_0.id,
        u1_0.created_at,
        u1_0.email,
        u1_0.first_login_completed,
        u1_0.name,
        u1_0.password,
        u1_0.phone,
        r1_0.user_id,
        r1_1.id,
        r1_1.active,
        r1_1.created_at,
        r1_1.description,
        r1_1.role_name 
    from
        users u1_0 
    left join
        user_roles r1_0 
            on u1_0.id=r1_0.user_id 
    left join
        roles r1_1 
            on r1_1.id=r1_0.role_id

        cm1_0.is_read,
        cm1_0.message,
        cm1_0.receiver_id,
        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at desc

    select
        u1_0.id,
        u1_0.created_at,
        u1_0.email,
        u1_0.first_login_completed,
        u1_0.name,
        u1_0.password,
        u1_0.phone,
        r1_0.user_id,
        r1_1.id,
        r1_1.active,
        r1_1.created_at,
        r1_1.description,
        r1_1.role_name 
    from
        users u1_0 
    left join
        user_roles r1_0 
            on u1_0.id=r1_0.user_id 
    left join
        roles r1_1 
            on r1_1.id=r1_0.role_id 
    where
        u1_0.email=?

    select
        cm1_0.id,

        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from

    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at

        u1_0.id,
        u1_0.created_at,
        u1_0.email,
        u1_0.first_login_completed,
        u1_0.name,
        u1_0.password,
        u1_0.phone,
        r1_0.user_id,
        r1_1.id,
        r1_1.active,
        r1_1.created_at,
        r1_1.description,
        r1_1.role_name 
    from
        users u1_0 
    left join
        user_roles r1_0 
            on u1_0.id=r1_0.user_id 
    left join
        roles r1_1 
            on r1_1.id=r1_0.role_id 
    where
        u1_0.email=?

        cm1_0.id,

        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at

        cm1_0.id,
        cm1_0.is_read,
        cm1_0.message,
        cm1_0.receiver_id,
        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at desc

Hibernate: 
    select
        u1_0.id,
        u1_0.created_at,
        u1_0.email,
        u1_0.first_login_completed,
        u1_0.name,
        u1_0.password,
        u1_0.phone,
        r1_0.user_id,
        r1_1.id,
        r1_1.active,
        r1_1.created_at,
        r1_1.description,
        r1_1.role_name 
    from
        users u1_0 
    left join
        user_roles r1_0 
            on u1_0.id=r1_0.user_id 
    left join
        roles r1_1 
            on r1_1.id=r1_0.role_id 
    where
        u1_0.email=?

        cm1_0.is_read,
        cm1_0.message,
        cm1_0.receiver_id,
        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at desc

        cm1_0.id,
        cm1_0.is_read,
        cm1_0.message,
        cm1_0.receiver_id,
        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at desc

Hibernate: 
    select
        u1_0.id,
        u1_0.created_at,
        u1_0.email,
        u1_0.first_login_completed,
        u1_0.name,
        u1_0.password,
        u1_0.phone,
        r1_0.user_id,
        r1_1.id,
        r1_1.active,
        r1_1.created_at,
        r1_1.description,
        r1_1.role_name 
    from
        users u1_0 
    left join
        user_roles r1_0 
            on u1_0.id=r1_0.user_id 
    left join
        roles r1_1 
            on r1_1.id=r1_0.role_id 
    where
        u1_0.email=?

        cm1_0.id,
        cm1_0.is_read,
        cm1_0.message,
        cm1_0.receiver_id,
        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at desc
Hibernate: 
    select
        count(cm1_0.id) 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    left join
        users r1_0 
            on r1_0.id=cm1_0.receiver_id 
    left join
        users s1_0 
            on s1_0.id=cm1_0.sender_id 
    where
        r1_0.id=? 
        and s1_0.id=? 
        and not(cm1_0.is_read)
Hibernate: 
    select
        r1_0.user_id,
        r1_1.id,

        r1_1.created_at,
        r1_1.description,
        r1_1.role_name 
    from
        user_roles r1_0 
    join
        roles r1_1 
            on r1_1.id=r1_0.role_id 
    where
        r1_0.user_id=?

        cm1_0.id,
        cm1_0.is_read,
        cm1_0.message,
        cm1_0.receiver_id,
        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at

    from
        users u1_0

        user_roles r1_0

        r1_1.role_name 
    from
        users u1_0 
    left join

    left join
        roles r1_1 
            on r1_1.id=r1_0.role_id

        count(cm1_0.id) 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    left join

            on r1_0.id=cm1_0.receiver_id

        users s1_0 
            on s1_0.id=cm1_0.sender_id 
    where
        r1_0.id=? 
        and s1_0.id=? 
        and not(cm1_0.is_read)

Hibernate: 
    select
        cm1_0.id,
        cm1_0.is_read,
        cm1_0.message,
        cm1_0.receiver_id,
        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=?

        u1_0.id,
        u1_0.created_at,
        u1_0.email,
        u1_0.first_login_completed,
        u1_0.name,
        u1_0.password,
        u1_0.phone,
        r1_0.user_id,
        r1_1.id,
        r1_1.active,
        r1_1.created_at,
        r1_1.description,
        r1_1.role_name 
    from
        users u1_0 
    left join
        user_roles r1_0 
            on u1_0.id=r1_0.user_id 
    left join
        roles r1_1 
            on r1_1.id=r1_0.role_id 
    where
        u1_0.email=?

    select
        u1_0.id,
        u1_0.created_at,
        u1_0.email,
        u1_0.first_login_completed,
        u1_0.name,
        u1_0.password,
        u1_0.phone,
        r1_0.user_id,
        r1_1.id,
        r1_1.active,
        r1_1.created_at,
        r1_1.description,
        r1_1.role_name 
    from
        users u1_0 
    left join
        user_roles r1_0 
            on u1_0.id=r1_0.user_id 
    left join
        roles r1_1 
            on r1_1.id=r1_0.role_id 
    where
        u1_0.email=?

Hibernate: 
    select
        cm1_0.id,
        cm1_0.is_read,
        cm1_0.message,
        cm1_0.receiver_id,
        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at desc

        cm1_0.is_read,
        cm1_0.message,
        cm1_0.receiver_id,
        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at desc

        r1_1.created_at,
        r1_1.description,
        r1_1.role_name 
    from
        users u1_0 
    left join

    left join
        roles r1_1 
            on r1_1.id=r1_0.role_id 
    where
        u1_0.email=?

        cm1_0.is_read,
        cm1_0.message,
        cm1_0.receiver_id,
        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at desc

        u1_0.id,
        u1_0.created_at,
        u1_0.email,
        u1_0.first_login_completed,
        u1_0.name,
        u1_0.password,
        u1_0.phone,
        r1_0.user_id,
        r1_1.id,
        r1_1.active,
        r1_1.created_at,
        r1_1.description,
        r1_1.role_name 
    from
        users u1_0 
    left join
        user_roles r1_0 
            on u1_0.id=r1_0.user_id 
    left join
        roles r1_1 
            on r1_1.id=r1_0.role_id 
    where
        u1_0.email=?

Hibernate: 
    select
        cm1_0.id,
        cm1_0.is_read,
        cm1_0.message,

    from

    where
        (

            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        )

            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at desc

Hibernate: 
    select
        cm1_0.id,
        cm1_0.is_read,
        cm1_0.message,
        cm1_0.receiver_id,
        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at desc

        cm1_0.id,
        cm1_0.is_read,
        cm1_0.message,
        cm1_0.receiver_id,
        cm1_0.sender_id,
        cm1_0.sent_at 
    from
        chat_messages cm1_0 
    where
        (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
        or (
            cm1_0.sender_id=? 
            and cm1_0.receiver_id=?
        ) 
    order by
        cm1_0.sent_at desc

        u1_0.id,

        u1_0.name,
        u1_0.password,
        u1_0.phone,
        r1_0.user_id,

        r1_1.created_at,
        r1_1.description,
        r1_1.role_name 
    from
        users u1_0 
    left join
        user_roles r1_0

    left join
        roles r1_1 
            on r1_1.id=r1_0.role_id 
    where
        u1_0.email=?
